hooks.description: Rename the tmux tab to 'Claude [<dir>]' where <dir> is the git repo root folder name if at the root, or the relative path within the repo if in a subdirectory, or just the current folder name if not in a git repo.
hooks.command: git_root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$git_root" ]; then prefix=$(git rev-parse --show-prefix 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$prefix" ]; then dir=$(basename "$git_root"); else dir=${prefix%/}; fi; else dir=$(basename "$PWD"); fi; tmux rename-window -t "$TMUX_PANE" "Claude [$dir]"

hooks.description: Prefix the tmux tab name with ⏳ while Claude is actively using tools, indicating work is in progress.
hooks.command: BASE=$(tmux display-message -p -t "$TMUX_PANE" '#W' | sed 's/^⏳//; s/^[✓?] //'); tmux rename-window -t "$TMUX_PANE" "⏳$BASE"

hooks.description: Prefix the tmux tab name with ✓ when Claude has finished its turn.
hooks.command: BASE=$(tmux display-message -p -t "$TMUX_PANE" '#W' | sed 's/^⏳//; s/^[✓?] //'); tmux rename-window -t "$TMUX_PANE" "✓ $BASE"
CURRENT=$(tmux display-message -p -t "$TMUX_PANE" '#W'); case "$CURRENT" in ✓*) ;; *) BASE=$(echo "$CURRENT" | sed 's/^⏳//; s/^[✓?] //'); tmux rename-window -t "$TMUX_PANE" "? $BASE" ;; esac
